_comment: Victor -> Victini reveal, RELOCATED to 2536/106/2900 (note 4). Keyframes are the ORIGINAL tower-verified path (RCON block-probed 2026-07-16) TRANSLATED by the humanoid's move delta (+13.4, -25.0, +84.5) from 2522.6/131/2815.5 -> 2536/106/2900, so the framing RELATIVE to Victini is preserved exactly. The reveal spot is assumed open like the tower ledge — if it isn't, re-probe/nudge in-world. THE TRANSFORM NOW HAPPENS MID-CUTSCENE: sango/victor_transform teleports the humanoid here and plays this scene; the cue at tick 60 runs sango/victor_transform_swap, which flashes the humanoid into Victini ON CAMERA, then the cry + title land as the camera cranes over and drops to the south close-up. KEYFRAME-Y CONVENTION (docs/ENGINE_FINDINGS.md): the spectated rig renders ~1.78 above keyframe y.

cues.subtitle: §7It was waiting for someone worth speaking to
